name: Robert Walmsley
techniques: PR #1854 neural stack (PR #1797 base + Phased TTT score-first)
Budget-compliant trim: PHASED_TTT_PREFIX_DOCS=1500 (vs PR #1854's 2000) to fit 600s eval
exploratory_not_claimed: Multibin-lambda PPM-D byte mixer (included in train_gpt.py; mix_bpb ~0.861) — not claimed as headline val_bpb due to open community question on byte-spread normalization vs Kraft compliance

compliance.track: Track A/B (claim is on the standard token-level val_bpb, identical under both interpretations)
compliance.issue_1017_C1_causality: Sliding-window eval scores each token from prefix only; Phased TTT is score-first
compliance.issue_1017_C2_normalized: Standard val_bpb is total token NLL / log(2) / bytes; the underlying SP8192 softmax is a proper normalized token distribution
compliance.issue_1017_C3_score_before_update: Phased TTT scores each chunk under no_grad before any optimizer step
compliance.issue_1017_C4_single_pass: Single left-to-right pass over the val token stream
